HIST_AWAKENING_NGP: You awaken with Cosmic Insight x{0:F1}.
HIST_VOID_INFUSION: The void feels thinner. Void Infusion is now possible.
TOOLTIP_FOCUS:
Gather raw magical potential.
Gain {0:F1} [i:aether] [c:purple]Aether[/c] per click.
TOOLTIP_ASCEND: Complete the Spire and [c:gold]transcend this reality[/c].
TOOLTIP_COMBUSTION: Combine [c:red]Fire[/c] and [c:cyan]Air[/c] for a temporary [i:aether] Aether boost.
TOOLTIP_FERTILITY: Combine [c:blue]Water[/c] and [c:brown]Earth[/c] for a temporary [i:life] Life boost.
TOOLTIP_PICKAXE: Increases [i:aether] Aether gain from manual Focus.
TUT_DESC_FOCUS:
Focus the raw magical potential ([i:aether] [c:purple]Aether[/c]) from the void.
Gather 10 Aether to continue.
TUT_DESC_MANIFESTFIRST:
Condense [i:aether] Aether into the first physical form:
a [c:gold]Speck of Matter[/c].
TUT_DESC_AUTOMATE: Now, manifest something that generates elements automatically.
